calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff's Motion for Attorney Fees.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Melanie Dawn Gheno, #7489.

James P. Watson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
No appearance by defendants Carlo Servino, individually dba Willie's Cafe, and Rodolfo Juan Broullon, individually dba Willie's Cafe.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS plaintiff's motion for attorney fees. Defendants Carlo Servino, individually dba Willie's Cafe, and Rodolfo Juan Broullon, individually dba Willie's Cafe, shal pay plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, attorney fees in the amount of $3,700.00.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Gary E. Looney, President of Creditors Trade Association, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Carlo Servino, individually dba Willie's Cafe, or Rodolfo Juan Broullon, individually dba Willie's Cafe.
Defaults were entered against defendants on February 23, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on February 23, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against Defaulted Defendants Carlo Servino, individually dba Willie's Cafe, and Rodolfo Juan Broullon, individually dba Willie's Cafe, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $54,582.13.
Prejudgment Interest - $9,288.84.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $485.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $64,355.97.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Continued To Jun-07-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-22-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2009 Continued To Feb-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
